title: Thelypteris liukiuensis
taxonomy: Thelypteris liukiuensis is classified within the family Thelypteridaceae and the order Polypodiales. This species belongs to the genus Thelypteris, a group of ferns. It is native to the island of Kauai in Hawaii, where it is found growing in shaded, humid environments. The classification of Thelypteris liukiuensis is further supported by its morphological characteristics, including its frond shape and venation pattern. As a result, this classification helps to distinguish it from other species within the Thelypteridaceae family.
